mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ITEM WHERE STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT NVL(SUM(S.CURRENT_QTY), 0) FROM STOCK S JOIN ITEM I ON S.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID WHERE I.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCK S JOIN ITEM I ON S.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID WHERE I.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND S.CURRENT_QTY < I.MIN_QTY

SELECT C.CATEGORY_NAME, COUNT(I.ITEM_ID) AS ITEM_COUNT, NVL(SUM(S.CURRENT_QTY), 0) AS TOTAL_QTY FROM CATEGORY C LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON C.CATEGORY_ID = I.CATEGORY_ID AND I.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN STOCK S ON I.ITEM_ID = S.ITEM_ID GROUP BY C.CATEGORY_ID, C.CATEGORY_NAME ORDER BY C.CATEGORY_ID ASC

SELECT S.ITEM_ID, I.ITEM_NAME, I.ITEM_CODE, I.MIN_QTY, S.CURRENT_QTY, 1 AS LOW_STOCK FROM STOCK S JOIN ITEM I ON S.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID WHERE I.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND S.CURRENT_QTY < I.MIN_QTY ORDER BY S.CURRENT_QTY ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT H.HISTORY_ID, H.ITEM_ID, I.ITEM_NAME, I.ITEM_CODE, H.HISTORY_TYPE, H.QTY, H.REASON, H.CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(H.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATED_AT FROM STOCK_HISTORY H JOIN ITEM I ON H.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID ORDER BY H.CREATED_AT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
